auto_applied_changes.note: Original claim of '300 lb' had no source support. All sources consistently give 180 kg = 397 lb. This is a major factual error that would be embarrassing in collector contexts.

summary: 10 changes auto-applied: 1 in g-series-2.7 (Belgian Gendarmerie count corrected 30→20), 7 in 911-3.2-carrera (Commemorative Edition 870→875, Speedster TL 1,930→1,933 in variants + notes + value_drivers [DL-002/DL-003/DL-010], Speedster total 2,100→2,104, 76,470→76,473 in two fields, Speedster disputed end month removed), 1 in 964 (Turbo S Leichtbau weight 300lb→397lb/180kg).
